cf_parsed.subtask_body: Verifying current best and checking if any cheaper tree exists. Current best: Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Dune(13)+Dune-Mill(17)=46 cable, 1 freq, total=61. To beat this need cable+15*freq < 61. With 1 freq need cable<46. With 2 freq need cable<31 (unlikely). Cheapest possible 1-freq tree connecting Pine,Dune,Mill: must avoid nodes that create interference. Safe nodes: Bay,Pine,Dune,Mill,Rock,Cape(careful-Cape/Pine,Cape/Mill interfere). Try Cape-Mill(6)+Cape-Dune(13)+Bay-Pine(16)=35 but Cape/Pine and Cape/Mill active→2 freq→35+30=65. Try Cliff-Dune(7)+Cliff-Mill(11)+Bay-Pine(16)=34 but Cliff/Dune,Cliff/Mill active→2 freq→34+30=64. Still worse than 61. Any 1-freq tree with cable<46: need path Pine-...-Dune-...-Mill or Pine-...-Mill-...-Dune with total<46. Dune-Mill(17) is cheapest Dune-Mill connection. Then need Pine connected cheaply: Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Dune(13)=29 vs Bay-Pine(16)+Dune-Mill already used... Actually Bay-Pine(16) to connect Pine to Dune costs 16 via Bay (Bay-Dune=13, total 29 for Pine-Dune leg). Alternative: Pine-Rock(25)+Rock-Dune(19)=44 just for Pine-Dune, worse. No cheaper 1-freq solution found. Current best of 61 stands.
cf_parsed.updated_plan_state: Best solution: Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Dune(13)+Dune-Mill(17)=46 cable, 1 freq, total=61. No active interference pairs. Verified tree and connectivity. No improvement found beyond this.

parsed.subtask_body:
Evaluating candidate Steiner trees connecting {Pine, Dune, Mill}:

**Candidate A**: Dune-Port(2) + Cliff-Port(7) + Cliff-Mill(11) + Bay-Pine(16) + Bay-Dune(13)
Wait, that creates a cycle (Dune connected via Port-Cliff and via Bay). Let me be careful.

Tree must be acyclic. Let me enumerate properly:

**Candidate 1**: Cape-Mill(6) + Cape-Dune(13) + Cape-Pine(22) = 41 cable, nodes={Cape,Mill,Dune,Pine}
Interference pairs active: Cape/Mill, Cape/Pine. Need Cape≠Mill, Cape≠Pine. Mill and Pine not interfering → 2 frequencies.
Total = 41 + 15*2 = 71. Worse than baseline.

**Candidate 2**: Dune-Port(2) + Cliff-Port(7) + Cliff-Mill(11) + Bay-Pine(16) + Bay-Port(11)
Nodes={Dune,Port,Cliff,Mill,Bay,Pine}. Check tree: Port connects to Dune,Cliff,Bay; Cliff connects to Port,Mill; Bay connects to Port,Pine. That's 5 edges, 6 nodes → tree ✓
Cable=2+7+11+16+11=47. Interference active pairs: Port/Rock(no Rock), Cliff/Port✓, Cliff/Dune✓, Cliff/Mill✓, Dune/Port✓, Cape/Cliff(no Cape), Cape/Pine(no Cape).
Graph: Port-Cliff, Port-Dune, Cliff-Dune, Cliff-Mill. Cliff conflicts with Port,Dune,Mill. Port conflicts with Cliff,Dune. Dune conflicts with Cliff,Port. Mill conflicts with Cliff.
Cliff needs color ≠ Port,Dune,Mill. Port needs ≠ Cliff,Dune. Dune needs ≠ Cliff,Port. Mill needs ≠ Cliff.
Try: Cliff=1, Port=2, Dune=3, Mill=2, Bay=1, Pine=1. Check: Cliff≠Port✓, Cliff≠Dune✓, Cliff≠Mill(1≠2)✓, Port≠Dune(2≠3)✓. 3 frequencies.
Total = 47 + 15*3 = 92. Worse.

**Candidate 3**: Dune-Port(2) + Cliff-Port(7) + Cliff-Mill(11) + Mill-Pine(26)
Nodes={Dune,Port,Cliff,Mill,Pine}. Cable=46. Interference: Cliff/Port, Cliff/Dune, Cliff/Mill, Dune/Port.
Cliff=1, Port=2, Dune=3, Mill=2, Pine=2. Check Cliff≠Mill(1≠2)✓, Cliff≠Port✓, Cliff≠Dune✓, Port≠Dune✓. 3 freq.
Total=46+45=91. Worse.

**Candidate 4**: Bay-Dune(13) + Bay-Pine(16) + Cliff-Mill(11) + Cliff-Dune(7)
Nodes={Bay,Dune,Pine,Cliff,Mill}. Edges: Bay-Dune, Bay-Pine, Cliff-Mill, Cliff-Dune. 4 edges, 5 nodes → tree ✓
Cable=47. Interference active: Cliff/Dune✓, Cliff/Mill✓. Cliff=1,Dune=2,Mill=2,Bay=1,Pine=1. 2 freq.
Total=47+30=77. Worse than baseline.

**Candidate 5**: Bay-Dune(13) + Bay-Pine(16) + Cape-Mill(6) + Cape-Dune(13)
Nodes={Bay,Dune,Pine,Cape,Mill}. Cable=48. Interference: Cape/Mill✓. Cape=1,Mill=2,Bay=1,Dune=1,Pine=1. Check Cape/Pine: Pine active, Cape/Pine interference → Cape≠Pine. Cape=1,Pine=2? Then Mill=2,Pine=2 ok(not interfering). 2 freq.
Total=48+30=78. Worse.

**Candidate 6**: Dune-Port(2)+Cape-Port(12)+Cape-Mill(6)+Cape-Pine(22)
Cable=42. Nodes={Dune,Port,Cape,Mill,Pine}. Interference: Dune/Port✓, Cape/Mill✓, Cape/Pine✓. 
Cape=1,Mill=2,Pine=2,Port=2,Dune=3(≠Port). Check: Cape≠Mill✓,Cape≠Pine✓,Dune≠Port(3≠2)✓. 3 freq.
Total=42+45=87.

**Candidate 7**: Bay-Dune(13)+Bay-Pine(16)+Cliff-Mill(11)+Cape-Cliff(9)
Nodes={Bay,Dune,Pine,Cliff,Mill,Cape}. Cable=49. Interference: Cliff/Dune(no direct edge but both active)✓, Cliff/Mill✓, Cape/Cliff✓, Cape/Mill✓, Cape/Pine✓.
Cape=1,Cliff=2,Mill=3,Dune=3(≠Cliff),Pine=2(≠Cape),Bay=1. Check Cape≠Cliff✓,Cape≠Mill(1≠3)✓,Cape≠Pine(1≠2)✓,Cliff≠Mill✓,Cliff≠Dune(2≠3)✓. 3 freq.
Total=49+45=94.

Baseline (55+15=70) still best. Let me try to beat it with 1-frequency solutions or cheaper 2-freq.

**Candidate 8**: Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Dune(13)+Dune-Mill(17). Nodes={Bay,Pine,Dune,Mill}. Cable=46. Interference: Cliff/Dune(no Cliff),Cliff/Mill(no Cliff). No active interference pairs! 1 freq. Total=46+15=61. 

Check: Bay-Pine, Bay-Dune, Dune-Mill. 3 edges, 4 nodes → tree ✓. All required terminals Pine,Dune,Mill included ✓. Active interference pairs among {Bay,Pine,Dune,Mill}: Port/Rock(no), Cliff/Port(no), Cliff/Dune(no Cliff), Cliff/Mill(no Cliff), Dune/Port(no Port), Cape/Cliff(no), Cape/Pine(no Cape), Cape/Mill(no Cape). None! 1 frequency suffices. Total=46+15=61. Better than 70!

**Candidate 9**: Can we do cheaper? Dune-Mill(17)+Mill-Pine(26)+Bay-Dune(13)=56 cable, 4 nodes, 1 freq=71. Worse.
Bay-Pine(16)+Cliff-Dune(7)+Cliff-Mill(11)+Bay-Cliff? No Bay-Cliff edge. 
Dune-Port(2)+Cliff-Port(7)+Cliff-Mill(11)+Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Dune(13)=49 cable but cycle issue... Bay-Dune and Dune-Port and Cliff-Port and Bay-Port would cycle. Let me recheck: edges Bay-Pine,Bay-Dune,Dune-Port,Port-Cliff,Cliff-Mill = 5 edges, 6 nodes → tree ✓. Cable=16+13+2+7+11=49. Interference: Cliff/Port✓,Cliff/Dune✓,Cliff/Mill✓,Dune/Port✓. Need 3 colors as before. Total=49+45=94.

**Candidate 10**: Cape-Mill(6)+Cliff-Dune(7)+Cliff-Port(7)+Dune-Port... wait cycle. 
Cape-Mill(6)+Bay-Dune(13)+Bay-Pine(16)=35 cable, nodes={Cape,Mill,Bay,Dune,Pine}. But Mill and Dune not connected! Need path. Add Cape-Dune(13): cable=48, but Cape-Dune+Bay-Dune creates... Cape-Mill,Cape-Dune,Bay-Dune,Bay-Pine: 4 edges, 5 nodes → tree ✓. Cable=6+13+13+16=48. Interference: Cape/Mill✓,Cape/Pine(no Cape-Pine edge but both active)✓. Cape=1,Mill=2,Dune=1,Bay=1,Pine=2. Check Cape≠Mill✓,Cape≠Pine(1≠2)✓. 2 freq. Total=48+30=78.

**Candidate 11**: Cape-Mill(6)+Cliff-Dune(7)+Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Dune(13). Nodes={Cape,Mill,Cliff,Dune,Bay,Pine}. Edges: Cape-Mill,Cliff-Dune,Bay-Pine,Bay-Dune. 4 edges, 6 nodes → not connected (Cape-Mill isolated from rest unless... Cliff-Dune connects Cliff and Dune; Bay-Dune connects Bay and Dune; Bay-Pine connects Pine; Cape-Mill isolated). Need to connect Cape-Mill. Add Cape-Cliff(9): edges Cape-Mill,Cape-Cliff,Cliff-Dune,Bay-Dune,Bay-Pine. 5 edges, 6 nodes. Check connectivity: Cape-Mill,Cape-Cliff-Dune-Bay-Pine. ✓ Cable=6+9+7+13+16=51. Interference: Cliff/Dune✓,Cliff/Mill(no direct but both active)✓,Cape/Cliff✓,Cape/Mill✓,Cape/Pine✓. Cape=1,Cliff=2,Mill=3,Dune=3,Bay=1,Pine=2. Check Cape≠Cliff✓,Cape≠Mill(1≠3)✓,Cape≠Pine(1≠2)✓,Cliff≠Dune(2≠3)✓,Cliff≠Mill(2≠3)✓. 3 freq. Total=51+45=96.

**Candidate 12**: Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Dune(13)+Cape-Mill(6)+Bay-Cape(13). Nodes={Bay,Pine,Dune,Cape,Mill}. Cable=48. Interference: Cape/Mill✓,Cape/Pine✓. Cape=1,Mill=2,Pine=2,Bay=1,Dune=1. Check Cape≠Mill✓,Cape≠Pine(1≠2)✓. 2 freq. Total=48+30=78.

**Candidate 13**: Can we get cable<30 with 1 freq? Minimum spanning tree on {Pine,Dune,Mill} directly: Pine-Dune? No direct edge. Dune-Mill(17),Mill-Pine(26)=43. Or via Steiner: Cliff-Dune(7)+Cliff-Mill(11)+Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Cliff? No edge. Cliff-Pine? No edge. 

Best so far: Candidate 8 with total=61.

**Candidate 14**: Try Dune-Mill(17)+Bay-Dune(13)+Bay-Pine(16)=46, same as Candidate 8 but different tree. Same result=61.

**Candidate 15**: Cliff-Dune(7)+Cliff-Mill(11)+Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Dune(13). Nodes={Cliff,Dune,Mill,Bay,Pine}. Cable=47. Interference: Cliff/Dune✓,Cliff/Mill✓. Cliff=1,Dune=2,Mill=2,Bay=1,Pine=1. 2 freq. Total=47+30=77.

**Candidate 16**: Dune-Port(2)+Cliff-Port(7)+Cliff-Mill(11)+Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Dune(13). Already checked=94.

**Candidate 17**: Can we find cable cost < 31 with 1 freq (to beat 61)?
Need tree connecting Pine,Dune,Mill with no active interference pairs. Cheapest edges not involving interfering nodes: Bay-Dune(13),Bay-Pine(16),Dune-Mill(17),Cape-Mill(6),Cape-Dune(13),Cape-Pine(22).
Try Cape-Mill(6)+Cape-Dune(13)+Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Dune(13): cycle at Dune. 
Cape-Mill(6)+Bay-Dune(13)+Bay-Pine(16)+Cape-Dune(13): same issue.
Cape-Mill(6)+Dune-Mill(17)+Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Dune(13): cycle at Dune-Mill and Bay-Dune both connect Dune... wait: edges Cape-Mill,Dune-Mill,Bay-Pine,Bay-Dune. 4 edges, 5 nodes={Cape,Mill,Dune,Bay,Pine}. Connectivity: Cape-Mill-Dune-Bay-Pine ✓. No cycle ✓. Cable=6+17+16+13=52. Interference: Cape/Mill✓,Cape/Pine(both active)✓. 2 freq. Total=52+30=82.

Cape-Mill(6)+Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Dune(13)=35 cable but only 4 nodes, Mill not connected to Dune/Pine. Need one more edge. Cheapest to connect: Cape-Dune(13) gives 48 cable (done above=78). Or Dune-Mill(17) gives 52 (done=82).

So Candidate 8 (total=61) is best. Let me verify once more:
Edges: Bay-Pine(16), Bay-Dune(13), Dune-Mill(17). Nodes: Bay,Pine,Dune,Mill. Tree: Bay is hub connecting Pine and Dune; Dune connects Mill. 3 edges, 4 nodes ✓. Required: Pine✓,Dune✓,Mill✓. No interference pairs among active nodes. 1 frequency. Total=46+15=61.
parsed.updated_plan_state: Best found: Bay-Pine(16)+Bay-Dune(13)+Dune-Mill(17)=46 cable, 1 freq, total=61. No interference pairs active. Verified tree structure. This beats baseline of 70. Could try to find cheaper trees but seems hard to get below 46 cable with 1 freq connecting Pine,Dune,Mill.

transcript.content:
PLAN_STATE: Goal: minimize cable_cost + 15*num_frequencies. Baseline is 55+15=70. Strategy: enumerate small Steiner trees connecting {Pine, Dune, Mill} possibly through Steiner nodes, then find chromatic number of induced interference subgraph. Key cheap paths: Dune-Port(2)+Cliff-Port(7)+Cliff-Mill(11)+Cliff-Dune(7) but that's a cycle. Try: Dune-Port(2)+Cliff-Port(7)+Cliff-Mill(11) = 20 cable, active={Dune,Port,Cliff,Mill}, need Pine too. Add Cape-Mill(6)+Cape-Pine(22)=28 more, total cable=48, 6 nodes. Or Dune-Port(2)+Cliff-Port(7)+Cliff-Mill(11)+Bay-Pine(16)=36 cable, 5 nodes {Dune,Port,Cliff,Mill,Bay,Pine}=6 nodes. Check interference coloring. Also try Cape-Mill(6)+Cape-Dune(13)+Cape-Pine(22)=41 cable, 4 nodes, 1 freq? Check interference. Best candidates to evaluate carefully in subtask 1.
